Major gaps: Cedar (new forge-policy impl, cedar-policy crate missing), CRUD handler bodies (4 todo!() stubs), gate tests (4 tests, none written). Reflection router not mounted in gateway — must be first change. G7/G5 live path blocked on OQ-FRF-1. Hexagonal risk: KetoCheck must be a port trait, not a direct import. 9 changes planned, 2 conditionally blocked.
